code: import React from'react';import'./contacts.css';import{MdOutlineEmail}from'react-icons/md';import{useRef}from'react';import emailjs from'@emailjs/browser';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";var Contacts=function Contacts(){var form=useRef();var sendEmail=function sendEmail(e){e.preventDefault();emailjs.sendForm('YOUR_SERVICE_ID','YOUR_TEMPLATE_ID',form.current,'YOUR_PUBLIC_KEY');e.target.reset();};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("section",{id:"contacts",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h5",{children:"Get in touch"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Contact Me"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container contact__container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"contact__options",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("article",{className:"contact__option",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(MdOutlineEmail,{className:"contact__option-icon"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h4",{children:"Email"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h5",{children:"zaforsadiq987@gmail.com"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{href:"mailto:zaforsadiq987@gmail.com",children:"Send a message"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{ref:form,onSubmit:sendEmail,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",name:"name",placeholder:"Your Full Name",required:true}),"  ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"email",name:"email",placeholder:"Your Email",required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("textarea",{name:"message",rows:"7",placeholder:"Your Message",required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:"btn btn-primary",children:"Send Message"})]})]})]});};export default Contacts;
